name: Tremor
description: A continuous baseline running through every cell, pulsing with mostly-small beats and the occasional sharp spike — a seismograph of the seed.

code.style: --pulse: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --rule: ( --tw: @r(4, 9); --th: @p(@r(10, 30), @r(12, 36), @r(48, 94)); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -2%; right: -2%; top: 49.4%; height: 1.2%; background: var(--color4); opacity: 0.5; transition: ease 500ms; } @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(50% - @var(--tw) * 0.5%); top: calc(50% - @var(--th) * 0.5%); width: calc(@var(--tw) * 1%); height: calc(@var(--th) * 1%); border-radius: 99px; background: var(--pulse); transition: ease 500ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
